heading: Pinkawillinie vs Pinks Beach — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Pinkawillinie, South Australia and Pinks Beach, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Pinkawillinie has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to Pinks Beach (37/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Pinkawillinie or Pinks Beach safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Pinkawillinie has a flood risk score of 37/100, while Pinks Beach scores 21/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Pinkawillinie scores 24/100 for bushfire risk. Pinks Beach scores 39/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Pinkawillinie or Pinks Beach?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Pinkawillinie has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.07% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
